mircap mircap
version 0
module 1 direct_call
type 1 i32
symbol 1 main function
symbol 2 callee function
function 1 1 - 1 2 0 1,1
function 2 2 1 1 2 0 1,1
func_block 1 1
func_block 2 2
block 1 1 1 2 3
block 2 2 4 5
insn 1 const_i32 r:0 i:41
insn 2 call r:1 f:2 v:0
insn 3 ret v:1
insn 4 copy r:1 v:0
insn 5 ret v:1
